_instructions: Professional experience. Keep claims specific to documented responsibilities; add verified outcomes only when available.

experiences.title: Supply Chain Analyst
experiences.description: Supports regional distribution reporting and analysis across inventory, transportation, warehouse, procurement, and fulfillment operations.
responsibilities: Build and maintain Power BI reporting for stock levels, shipment movement, warehouse activity, transportation metrics, and order fulfillment.
Analyze replenishment cycles, inventory utilization, and SKU-level movement to support allocation and product availability decisions.
Support transportation visibility, shipment tracking, and coordination across logistics, warehouse, and procurement teams.
Use SQL, Excel, and Power Query to streamline recurring inventory, procurement, logistics, and operational reporting.
Monitor inventory reconciliation, fulfillment exceptions, inventory aging, purchase orders, and supplier delivery performance.

experiences.title: Supply Chain Analyst
experiences.description: Supported supply chain planning and operational reporting across procurement, logistics, inventory, and order-management data.
responsibilities: Analyzed operational data to support daily supply chain planning and reporting decisions.
Developed Power BI dashboards for shipment status, warehouse metrics, procurement cycles, supplier performance, and inventory utilization.
Used SQL to extract, validate, and transform ERP datasets for inventory reporting and supply chain performance tracking.
Performed SKU-level stock-movement analysis, inventory reconciliation, and transactional data validation.
Automated recurring reporting workflows with Excel formulas, Power Query transformations, and standardized templates.
